name: Skillit Nachos:
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Picante sauce (salsa for you people that aren't cooking-literate)
1 15-ounce can pinto or black bean, rinsed and drained (We leave these out because of my allergies)
1 large or 2 small ripe avocados, seeded and diced
1/2 to 1 cup sour cream, as desired
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12-inch skillet, brown the meat with onion until cooked through; drain excess fat.
2. Add picante sauce, beans, and chili powder; bring mixture to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in chopped tomato, avocado, and olives.
5. Remove from heat and sprinkle with cheese.
6. Spoon sour cream onto the center of the meat mixture.
7. Arrange a row of tortilla chips around the edge of the skillet.
8. Serve immediately with additional tortilla chips, flour tortillas, and extra picante sauce.
